◎简　　介  

　　When David, an ex-monk still in his twenties meets Mark, he falls hard; soon he's asked Mark if they can live together. Things go well for a while, and then differences in their definition of "commitment" begin to push them apart. Mark wants other sexual adventures, David tries to go along.
